source_pr.title: test: stabilize TestRenameTableIntermediateState
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #44948 

Problem Summary:

Similar to #43825. It is possible that the last DDL job does not exit in time.

```

```

```
[2024/01/11 06:36:15.419 +00:00] [INFO] [ddl_worker.go:259] ["add DDL jobs"] [category=ddl] ["batch count"=1] [jobs="ID:111,...
```

happens before 

```
[2024/01/11 06:36:15.420 +00:00] [INFO] [callback.go:122] ["on job updated"] [job="ID:110...
```

### What changed and how does it work?

Add a check in `onJobUpdated()`, if the handling job is old, skip it.
